data.name: Sex, Camera, Action! 🔞
data.detailed_description:
From misfortune to Malibu - help Erik succeed in the world of the adult movie industry! An unexpected offer from his uncle completely changes the protagonist's life as he becomes an assistant at a porn studio in Malibu.

Sex, Camera, Action!🔞 is a visual novel with point-and-click elements that’s going to show you the insides of the porn industry from both perspectives of work and fun!

Erik’s life hasn't been much fun recently though - he’s been fired from six jobs in just one month, resulting in him struggling even to pay rent. Convinced he’s somewhat cursed, he receives a phone call from his uncle Angus, who runs an adult film studio in Malibu and offers him a job there. Being short of options, Erik accepts the offer and starts a life-changing journey - upon arriving, he meets a cast of intriguing characters:

Amelia: Assistant and secretary, who quickly becomes Erik’s guide and confidante.
Diego: The talented cameraman with a sharp tongue and a past in music video filming.
Brody: Former director from Hollywood
Ruby: The seductive beginner in the adult film world, Amelia’s stepsister, immediately becomes interested in Erik.
Cleo: The experienced actress with a sharp mind and a body that turns heads, but is a sweetheart in person
Mickey: The witty and charming make-up artist responsible for the studio’s visual flair.

You’ll face numerous challenges while navigating the intricacies of adult film production - from running errands and shooting assistance to dealing with new coworkers, you’ll have to build strong relationships and prove you’ve got what it takes and that it’s more than just a series of unfortunate events!

Features:
  • Immersive 3D graphics - experience the attentively crafted environments, characters and adult scenes!
  • Various and hot 18+ content - interactive adult scenery with a variety to it, so that you can find what suits your tastes better.
  • Engaging characters - unique, with their own interests and personalities. Find your way to approach each one of them!
  • Branching storyline - your choice matters! Shape the outcome of the story through multiple decisions, leading to various outcomes for everyone involved.
  • Visual novel with gameplay elements - enjoy the mini-games, find hidden secrets and explore different locations!
  • Feel the heart, tension, humour, fiery emotions, romance and much more alongside the characters!

data.short_description: Sex, Camera, Action!🔞 invites you to an exciting journey into the world of the film industry and sexual adventures in an unusual place - an elite country mansion, where an adult film studio is being set up.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 or above
  • Processor: Intel or AMD
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Direct X compatible
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
